resposta:
solution:
```
class Solution:
    def minimizeXor(self, num1: int, num2: int) -> int:
        set_bits_num2 = bin(num2).count('1')
        x = 0
        for i in range(30):
            if (num1 >> i) & 1 and set_bits_num2:
                x |= 1 << i
                set_bits_num2 -= 1
        return x
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(logN)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution iterates through the bits of num1 from most significant to least significant, setting the corresponding bit in x if it is set in num1 and there are remaining set bits to match in num2.
